source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open OddsMarket, the prediction-market trading app at http://localhost:3003 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Open the market 'Will Bitcoin trade above $150,000 by year-end?' (ticker CRYPTO-BTC-150K-2026), and place a LIMIT BUY order for 17 YES shares with a limit price of 40 cents, then confirm the order.
